subtasks.description: Synthesize strengths/weaknesses and define precise adjustments needed

completion_evidence: Synthesis for Portfolio V1 analytics and V2 adjustment plan: 1) Pairwise corr: High clustering in beverages/household (KO-KMB-CL-GIS with corr up to 0.69). Action: trim overlapping names (reduce CL, GIS), keep KO/KMB core; diversify into ingredients/packaging. 2) Performance: 3Y ann return -1.24%, Sharpe -0.18, IR -0.94; 1Y TR +3.38%. Beta tool null; 3Y performance beta shows -0.31 (from perf tool), suggesting low/negative beta but weak alpha realization. 3) Exposures: net +0.30, gross 2.0 (on target). 4) Group drivers (3Y total return): Tobacco +35% (MO, RLX strong); Household +2.5% (KMB, REYN positive); Beverages +1.6% (OK); Food products -2.3% (mixed); Personal care -2.8% (shorts OK); Distribution/Retail -15.5% (drag from DG/BJ/ACI longs). Sub-industry: Brewers -14.5% (drag from TAP/SAM); Food Retail -29.1% (drag); Distillers/Vintners +27.6% (risk to STZ short); Agri products +12.4% (supports INGR). 5) Adjustments for V2 (weights approximate to keep net ~+30, gross ~200): - Reduce clustering: CL 0.06->0.03; GIS 0.07->0.04; keep KO 0.07; KMB 0.08. - Cut brewers: TAP 0.055->0.00; SAM 0.055->0.03. - Reduce food retail exposure: ACI 0.06->0.02; BJ 0.065->0.03; keep DG 0.08. - Add/scale quality value longs: INGR 0.07->0.08; REYN 0.055->0.07; IPAR 0.065->0.07; PPC 0.065->0.07; KDP 0.065->0.07; add ADM (from pool) long 0.045; add LW (from pool) long 0.045. - Beverages: keep CCEP 0.055; consider slight trim KO if needed after totals. - Shorts: Maintain HSY 0.09, CLX 0.08, ELF 0.07, CELH 0.07, EL 0.06, FRPT 0.06, UTZ 0.06, SFM 0.06, VITL 0.05, COTY 0.05, WDFC 0.05. Adjust: Reduce STZ 0.07->0.03 (sub-industry strength risk); Remove COST short 0.08->0.00; Add USFD short 0.05; Add PFGC short 0.05. - Expected impact: lower pairwise corr (less KO-KMB-CL-GIS overlap), reduce exposure to underperforming food retail and brewers, tilt more to tobacco/household/ingredients/packaging quality/value; maintain net ~+0.30, gross ~2.0; improve Sharpe/IR and stabilize returns. Next: implement V2 weights, re-run correlation, performance, factor tilts, and group performance checks.

completion_evidence: Tool portfolio_exposure_calculator returned substantial text output
Tool portfolio_exposure_calculator returned substantial text output
Tool portfolio_exposure_calculator returned substantial text output

Optimization and risk checks complete. Key results: 1) Exposures (final): long 1.15, short 0.85, gross 2.00, net +0.30 (portfolio_exposure_calculator). 2) Pairwise correlations: clustering reduced; beverages/household still correlated but trimmed via lower CL/GIS weights and diversified adds (ADM, LW); USFD~PFGC pair high corr contained on short sleeve. 3) Factor tilts (V2): strong value net tilt (+0.961), negative growth/momentum tilts by design, modest negative volatility tilt; quality modestly negative net due to short book focused on high-multiple names. 4) Industry concentration (V2): diversified across beverages (~0.335), food products (~0.575), household (~0.325), personal care (~0.315), tobacco (~0.13), distribution/retail (~0.295). 5) VaR (portfolio): 2.445%. 6) Performance diagnostics: beta calc tool returned null but 3Y analytics show negative beta regime (~-0.29 to -0.31 across V1/V2 runs) with stabilized 1Y total return behavior. 7) Build_portfolio optimized weights used for final; exposures reconfirmed at targets.

Alternative approach used due to: calculate_portfolio_beta_vs_index returned beta: null repeatedly for V1 and V2 despite valid portfolio_dict. All other analytics succeeded (performance, exposures, correlation, tilts).

execution_history.evidence: Optimization and risk checks complete. Key results: 1) Exposures (final): long 1.15, short 0.85, gross 2.00, net +0.30 (portfolio_exposure_calculator). 2) Pairwise correlations: clustering reduced; beverages/household still correlated but trimmed via lower CL/GIS weights and diversified adds (ADM, LW); USFD~PFGC pair high corr contained on short sleeve. 3) Factor tilts (V2): strong value net tilt (+0.961), negative growth/momentum tilts by design, modest negative volatility tilt; quality modestly negative net due to short book focused on high-multiple names. 4) Industry concentration (V2): diversified across beverages (~0.335), food products (~0.575), household (~0.325), personal care (~0.315), tobacco (~0.13), distribution/retail (~0.295). 5) VaR (portfolio): 2.445%. 6) Performance diagnostics: beta calc tool returned null but 3Y analytics show negative beta regime (~-0.29 to -0.31 across V1/V2 runs) with stabilized 1Y total return behavior. 7) Build_portfolio optimized weights used for final; exposures reconfirmed at targets.

Alternative approach used due to: calculate_portfolio_beta_vs_index returned beta: null repeatedly for V1 and V2 despite valid portfolio_dict. All other analytics succeeded (performance, exposures, correlation, tilts).
